## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt && make lint` pass
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes (mypy --strict + pyright)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated for new adapter/detector behavior
- [ ] Public functions have type annotations and docstrings
- [ ] `docs/` updated if behavior changed
